data.title: Oracle’s stock surges by 3% after Meta cloud deal confirmation and bullish AI revenue forecast
data.description:
Oracle stock surged 3% on Thursday, after the company confirmed a major cloud-computing partnership with Meta and issued a powerful new forecast for its artificial intelligence (AI) revenue growth. The announcement came during Oracle’s AI World conference in Las Vegas, where the company outlined how its AI-driven database business will expand sharply in the coming […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracles-stock-surges-by-3/

data.title: Fed's Kashkari Highlights Labor Market Risks Over Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed concerns that the risk of an unexpected downturn in the labor market outweighs the risk of a slight increase in inflation. He suggested that the perceived severity of the economic slowdown might be greater than the actual situation.

data.title: Tether Faces Lawsuit Over Alleged Unlawful USDT Freeze
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Tether, a prominent stablecoin issuer, is facing legal action from Texas-based Riverstone Consulting. The lawsuit, filed in the Southern District of New York, accuses Tether of unlawfully freezing $44.7 million in USDT, which allegedly caused Riverstone to miss significant investment opportunities.

The incident dates back to April when Tether froze assets in eight offline wallets controlled by Riverstone at the request of Bulgarian police. Riverstone argues that Tether's actions were procedurally flawed, as they did not adhere to the formal processes outlined in the Bulgarian International Judicial Assistance Treaty. This treaty mandates that information exchanges must occur through central authorities and diplomatic channels.

Riverstone claims that when they reached out to Tether for clarification, they were instructed to communicate directly with Bulgarian authorities, who reportedly did not respond.

As of September 15, Tether has collaborated with global law enforcement agencies to freeze $3.2 billion in USDT, with the stablecoin's circulation exceeding $180 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks drop by 7.68% after rallying to $94 billion
data.description:
Bitcoin mining stocks have dropped sharply by 7. 68% after rallying to a total market cap of $94 billion two days ago.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-mining-stocks-drop-by-7-68/

data.title: Robinhood Lists CZ-backed ASTER and Tether’s Plasma (XPL): Expanding Amid Market Turbulence
data.description:
Robinhood, the popular trading platform, has recently made the strategic decision to list two new cryptocurrencies: ASTER, which is backed by the prominent figure and cryptocurrency advocate Changpeng Zhao (commonly referred to as CZ), and Tether’s Plasma (XPL). This move comes at a time of significant volatility in the cryptocurrency market, where many traders are seeking innovative investment opportunities. By expanding its offerings, Robinhood aims to attract a wider range of investors and position itself as a leading platform amid the ongoing market turbulence. This development showcases the company's commitment to adapting to the ever-changing landscape of digital assets and meeting the diverse needs of its users.
source: https://blocknews.com/robinhood-lists-cz-backed-aster-and-tethers-plasma-xpl-expanding-amid-market-turbulence/

data.title: Ghana Plans Cryptocurrency Regulation by Year-End
data.description: According to PANews, Ghana's central bank governor, Johnson Asiama, announced plans to implement a law regulating cryptocurrencies and virtual assets by the end of December. Speaking at an International Monetary Fund (IMF) meeting in Washington, Asiama emphasized the importance of strengthening oversight and monitoring of these transactions. He stated that a regulatory framework has been established, and a new bill has been submitted to parliament, aiming for approval by the year's end to enable effective regulation of cryptocurrencies in Ghana. As Africa's largest gold producer, Ghana is forming a new department and developing expertise to support regulatory efforts in this sector.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Faces Pressure in Tether Holdings Investment Pitch
data.description: According to PANews, Cantor Fitzgerald LP is under significant pressure as it presents Tether Holdings to investors with a potential valuation of $500 billion. If Tether achieves its goal and raises approximately $15 billion, the value of Cantor's Tether shares could reach $25 billion. Over a year ago, the New York investment bank purchased Tether's convertible bonds for over $600 million, granting it a 5% equity stake. A successful transaction would not only generate substantial wealth for Tether's founders but also yield considerable returns for Cantor, potentially earning billions. The terms of the share sale are still evolving, and it remains uncertain what valuation the deal might reach or whether the bank will be permitted to convert its bonds into equity and sell part of its holdings to new investors.

data.title: Nasdaq-Listed Zeta Network Raises $231M via Bitcoin-Backed Private Placement
data.description:
Zeta's private placement funded in Bitcoin or SolvBTC, a wrapped Bitcoin token, is being touted as a means to strengthen its balance sheet.
source: https://decrypt.co/344712/nasdaq-listed-zeta-network-231m-bitcoin-backed-private-placement

data.title: U.S. Senate rejects Republican funding bill, leaving shutdown prospects uncertain
data.description: Market news: The U.S. Senate rejected the government funding bill proposed by the Republicans, and there is no clear solution to the current government shutdown.

data.title: Coinbase launches "Blue Carpet Program" to provide more convenient support for asset issuers
data.description: Coinbase has announced the launch of "The Blue Carpet," a new listing support program designed to provide more transparent, convenient, and valuable support to digital asset issuers. The program consolidates previously fragmented services, including dedicated listing team guidance, customized asset pages, discounted services, and Coinbase One subscriptions. Listing is completely free, with no application or promotion fees.

data.title: Bank of England Deputy Governor: Stablecoin holding limit will be lifted after economic risks are eliminated
data.description: Sarah Breeden, deputy governor of the Bank of England, said the central bank will remove its proposed cap on the amount of stablecoins that individuals and businesses can hold once they no longer pose a threat to the economy. Breeden noted that the rapid adoption of stablecoins could lead to a “massive outflow” of bank deposits.

data.title: Ripple acquires GTreasury for $1 billion in XRP
data.description:
Ripple has acquired GTreasury for $1 billion worth of XRP, according to an official statement released on Thursday. The deal throws Ripple right into the heart of the $120 trillion corporate treasury market, giving it direct access to some of the largest companies on Earth and their global capital operations through GTreasury, which has reportedly […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-acquires-gtreasury-for-1-billion/

data.title: BNY profit surges by 21% in Q3 as bullish stock market lifts client assets to $57.8 trillion
data.description:
BNY reported a 21% jump in profit for the third quarter of 2025, powered by a rising stock market and higher client activity that pushed total assets under custody and administration to $57. 8 trillion. According to BNY’s Q3 earnings report, net income rose to $1. 34 billion, while earnings per share reached $1. 88, up 25% from […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bny-profit-surges-by-21-in-q3/

data.title: Bitcoin Fate Sealed By October 31? Analyst Says The Clock Is Ticking
data.description:
Bitcoin slipped below three-day Ichimoku cloud support on Wednesday, prompting market technician Dr Cat (@DoctorCatX) to flag the first decisive warning for bulls while outlining a tight sequence of conditional signals into month-end. Sharing a chart on X, he wrote: “Bulls finally lost the 3D kumo support which is the first clear red flag to look for. ” He cautioned that the breakdown does not guarantee a straight-line slide, adding that “the kumo is very thick here which means the price can be very spiky/turbulent and even further down moves may be ‘bumpy’ for bears with bounces etc…” Why Bitcoin’s Next Bull Window Opens October 31 The analyst framed the next tests through the lens of Ichimoku’s time-price structure and the weekly baseline. “Probably the clearest indication for now to watch for would be the time cycles and whether the weekly Kijun Sen will hold,” he said, specifying levels at $105
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-fate-sealed-october-31/

data.title: Cardano’s Hydra Hits 1 Thousand TPS in Testing Phase, Outperforms Visa, Mastercard and PayPal
data.description:

data.title: France’s Lise Wins DLT Greenlight, Targeting 2026 Stock Exchange IPOs On-chain
data.description:
France, via Banque de France, ESMA, AMF and ECB, has seen Lise secure a DLT TSS license under the EU Pilot; Stock trading and Exchange custody run on a ledger with instant settlement, and IPO access for SMEs has expanded, with early-2026 debuts planned and backing from BNP Paribas and Bpifrance.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/france-just-approved-a-tokenized-stock-exchange-and-it-wants-to-rewrite-how-ipos-work/
